title: eleusine yemenica
intro: Eleusine yemenica, also known as grass or wild grass, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the family Poaceae. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial properties. Eleusine yemenica has been used to treat various health issues, including fever, cough, and digestive problems, and its extracts have shown potential in reducing inflammation and improving immune function. The herbal preparations of Eleusine yemenica include infusions, decoctions, and extracts, which can be used to treat various health conditions, and it is often used in traditional medicine in some parts of the world.
